entities.name: PASTEURIA PENETRANS
entities.description: Hyperparasitic bacterium that attaches to nematode cuticles

entities.name: HETERODERA CAJANI
entities.description: Nematode species whose cuticle is the target for Pasteuria spores

entities.name: MONOCLONAL ANTIBODIES
entities.description: Antibodies raised to the cuticle surface of Heterodera cajani J2

entities.name: IMMUNOFLUORESCENCE
entities.description: Technique used to characterize monoclonal antibodies

entities.name: WESTERN BLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: Technique used to characterize monoclonal antibodies and identify antigens

entities.name: CUTICLE
entities.description: The outer surface of the nematode Heterodera cajani

entities.name: SPORE ADHESION
entities.description: The ability of Pasteuria spores to attach to the nematode cuticle

entities.name: PASTEURIA RECEPTOR
entities.description: A receptor on the nematode cuticle that Pasteuria spores bind to

entities.name: HC/129
entities.description: A specific monoclonal antibody that reduces spore attachment

entities.name: HC/145
entities.description: A specific monoclonal antibody that increases spore attachment
